cabg_single_vessel_on-pump_harvest.question:
CPT 33533 (Single vessel, on-pump) selected.

Was a saphenous vein harvested? If so, how?

options.label: Open vein harvest (included in CABG — not billed separately)
options.description: Coronary artery bypass, using venous graft(s); single coronary venous graft. Open saphenous vein harvest is included in the primary CABG CPT code and is NOT billed separately.

options.label: Endoscopic vein harvest (EVH) — adds CPT 33508
options.description: Endoscopic vein harvest for CABG (add-on to 33533). Separately billable. Bill 33533 + 33508. EVH is commonly missed — it adds 5.05 wRVU to the case.

options.label: No vein harvested (arterial conduit only)
options.description: Coronary artery bypass, using venous graft(s); single coronary venous graft. No saphenous vein harvest performed — arterial conduit(s) only.

options.description: Endoscopic vein harvest for CABG (add-on to 33534). Separately billable. Bill 33534 + 33508. EVH is commonly missed — it adds 5.05 wRVU to the case.
